description: GO hierarchy and active-site conservation visualization for MCR-1 analysis
code:
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import matplotlib.patches as mpatches
import numpy as np

fig, (ax1, ax2) = plt.subplots(1, 2, figsize=(16, 10))

# Panel 1: GO Term Hierarchy showing the mis-assignment
ax1.set_xlim(0, 10)
ax1.set_ylim(0, 10)
ax1.set_title("GO Term Hierarchy: Sibling Term Error", fontsize=14, fontweight='bold')
ax1.axis('off')

# Draw hierarchy boxes
# Root
rect_root = mpatches.FancyBboxPatch((2.5, 8.5), 5, 0.8, boxstyle="round,pad=0.1", 
                                      facecolor='#E8E8E8', edgecolor='black', linewidth=1.5)
ax1.add_patch(rect_root)
ax1.text(5, 8.9, 'GO:0016772\ntransferase activity,\ntransferring P-groups', 
         ha='center', va='center', fontsize=8, fontweight='bold')

# Wrong branch (red)
rect_wrong = mpatches.FancyBboxPatch((0.3, 5.5), 4, 1.0, boxstyle="round,pad=0.1", 
                                       facecolor='#FFB3B3', edgecolor='red', linewidth=2)
ax1.add_patch(rect_wrong)
ax1.text(2.3, 6.0, 'GO:0016776 ✗ WRONG\nphosphotransferase,\nphosphate group as acceptor\n(EC 2.7.4.*)', 
         ha='center', va='center', fontsize=7.5, color='red', fontweight='bold')

# Correct branch (green)
rect_correct = mpatches.FancyBboxPatch((5.7, 5.5), 4, 1.0, boxstyle="round,pad=0.1", 
                                         facecolor='#B3FFB3', edgecolor='green', linewidth=2)
ax1.add_patch(rect_correct)
ax1.text(7.7, 6.0, 'GO:0016780 ✓ CORRECT\nphosphotransferase,\nother substituted P-groups\n(EC 2.7.8.*)', 
         ha='center', va='center', fontsize=7.5, color='darkgreen', fontweight='bold')

# Specific correct term
rect_specific = mpatches.FancyBboxPatch((5.7, 2.8), 4, 1.0, boxstyle="round,pad=0.1", 
                                          facecolor='#80FF80', edgecolor='green', linewidth=2)
ax1.add_patch(rect_specific)
ax1.text(7.7, 3.3, 'GO:0043838 ✓ MOST SPECIFIC\nPE:Kdo2-lipid A\nPEtN transferase\n(EC 2.7.8.43)', 
         ha='center', va='center', fontsize=7.5, color='darkgreen', fontweight='bold')

# Wrong children examples
rect_child1 = mpatches.FancyBboxPatch((0.3, 2.8), 4, 0.8, boxstyle="round,pad=0.1", 
                                        facecolor='#FFD0D0', edgecolor='gray', linewidth=1)
ax1.add_patch(rect_child1)
ax1.text(2.3, 3.2, 'Examples:\n• nucleoside diphosphate kinase\n• polyphosphate kinase\n• phosphomevalonate kinase', 
         ha='center', va='center', fontsize=7, color='gray')

# Draw arrows
# Root to wrong branch
ax1.annotate('', xy=(2.3, 6.5), xytext=(4, 8.5),
            arrowprops=dict(arrowstyle='->', color='red', lw=2))

# Root to correct branch  
ax1.annotate('', xy=(7.7, 6.5), xytext=(6, 8.5),
            arrowprops=dict(arrowstyle='->', color='green', lw=2))

# Correct branch to specific
ax1.annotate('', xy=(7.7, 3.8), xytext=(7.7, 5.5),
            arrowprops=dict(arrowstyle='->', color='green', lw=1.5))

# Wrong branch to children
ax1.annotate('', xy=(2.3, 3.6), xytext=(2.3, 5.5),
            arrowprops=dict(arrowstyle='->', color='gray', lw=1))

# MCR-1 annotation arrow (crossing from wrong to correct)
ax1.annotate('MCR-1\n(EC 2.7.8.43)', xy=(5.7, 3.3), xytext=(0.3, 1.5),
            fontsize=9, fontweight='bold', color='darkblue',
            arrowprops=dict(arrowstyle='->', color='blue', lw=2, ls='--'),
            bbox=dict(boxstyle='round,pad=0.3', facecolor='lightblue', edgecolor='blue'))

# Panel 2: Active Site Residue Conservation
ax2.set_title("Active-Site Residue Conservation: MCR-1 vs EptA", fontsize=14, fontweight='bold')

residues = ['E246', 'T285', 'N329', 'K333', 'H395', 'D465', 'H466', 'E468', 'H478']
epta_res = ['E244', 'T282', 'D326', 'K330', 'H385', 'D455', 'H456', 'E458', 'H468']
conserved = [True, True, False, True, True, True, True, True, True]
roles = ['Zn\nbinding', 'Nucleophilic\nThr/Zn', 'Catalytic', 'Catalytic', 'Catalytic',
         'Zn\nbinding', 'Zn\nbinding', 'Colistin\nresist.', 'Catalytic']

colors = ['#2ecc71' if c else '#e74c3c' for c in conserved]
bars = ax2.barh(range(len(residues)), [1]*len(residues), color=colors, edgecolor='black', height=0.6)

ax2.set_yticks(range(len(residues)))
ax2.set_yticklabels([f"MCR-1: {r}\nEptA: {e}" for r, e in zip(residues, epta_res)], fontsize=8)
ax2.set_xlim(0, 3)
ax2.set_xticks([])

for i, (res, role, cons) in enumerate(zip(residues, roles, conserved)):
    status = "CONSERVED ✓" if cons else "DIFFERENT (N→D)"
    ax2.text(1.1, i, f"{status}  |  {role}", va='center', fontsize=9,
            fontweight='bold' if not cons else 'normal')

ax2.text(1.5, -1.2, f"8/9 residues conserved (89%) — Active enzyme confirmed", 
         ha='center', fontsize=11, fontweight='bold', color='darkgreen',
         bbox=dict(boxstyle='round,pad=0.3', facecolor='#e8f5e9', edgecolor='green'))

# Add legend
ax2.text(1.5, 9.5, "All positions validated by mutagenesis:\nAla substitution abolishes PEtN transfer", 
         ha='center', fontsize=9, style='italic', color='gray')

plt.tight_layout()
plt.savefig('go_term_analysis.png', dpi=150, bbox_inches='tight')
plt.show()
print("Figure saved: go_term_analysis.png")
